Operation 'getTags' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Added context about what tags are used for, clarified that this returns a collection, and mentioned pagination/filtering support to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all tags in a space environment
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all tags available in the specified space and environment. Tags are used to organize and categorize content entries. Returns a TagCollection containing tag objects with their metadata. Supports pagination and filtering parameters to manage large tag collections.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Added context about what tags are used for, clarified that this returns a collection, and mentioned pagination/filtering support to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

message: Operation 'getSpace' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack specificity and context. Enhanced to clarify what information is returned (Space object with metadata, configuration, locales) and the operation's purpose in understanding space structure, improving AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves metadata and configuration information for a specific space. Returns a Space object containing the space's system information, name, and localization settings. This operation provides details about the space structure and available locales for content delivery.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity and context. Enhanced to clarify what information is returned (Space object with metadata, configuration, locales) and the operation's purpose in understanding space structure, improving AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getEntries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While the summary is adequate, the description lacks detail about what is returned (EntryCollection schema), the types of filtering available, and practical use cases. Added information about return type and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve a collection of entries filtered by optional query parameters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of entries from the specified space and environment. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination through optional query parameters. Returns an EntryCollection containing matching entries with their complete content and system metadata. Use this operation to fetch multiple entries based on content type, tags, or other criteria.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description lacks detail about what is returned (EntryCollection schema), the types of filtering available, and practical use cases. Added information about return type and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Both summary and description are overly generic and lack specificity. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup mechanism. Enhanced description to explain what is returned (Entry object with fields and metadata) and when to use this operation, making it clearer for AI agents to determine appropriate usage.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific entry by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single entry by its ID from the specified space and environment. Returns the complete Entry object including all fields, system metadata, and localized content. Use this operation when you need to fetch a specific piece of content by its entry ID.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are overly generic and lack specificity. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup mechanism. Enhanced description to explain what is returned (Entry object with fields and metadata) and when to use this operation, making it clearer for AI agents to determine appropriate usage.

message: Operation 'getAssets' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary and description are extremely vague with no context about what assets are or what is returned. Added clarification that assets include media files, explained the return type (AssetCollection), and provided context about the operation's purpose in content delivery workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of assets (images, videos, documents, and other media files) from the specified space and environment. Supports filtering and pagination through optional query parameters. Returns an AssetCollection containing asset metadata including URLs, file information, and system details. Use this operation to discover and fetch media files for delivery to applications or websites.
data.reasoning: Summary and description are extremely vague with no context about what assets are or what is returned. Added clarification that assets include media files, explained the return type (AssetCollection), and provided context about the operation's purpose in content delivery workflows.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific asset by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single asset by its ID from the specified space and environment. Returns the complete Asset object including file metadata, URLs, and system information. Use this operation to fetch a specific media file (image, video, document, etc.) for delivery or processing.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description lack specificity and context. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup. message: Operation 'getContentTypes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary and description provide no context about what content types are or their purpose. Added explanation that content types define entry structure, clarified the return type (ContentTypeCollection), and explained use cases for discovering available content structures.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all content type definitions available in the specified space and environment. Content types define the structure and fields for entries. Returns a ContentTypeCollection containing metadata about each content type including field definitions, validation rules, and system information. Use this operation to discover available content structures or validate entry schemas.
data.reasoning: Summary and description provide no context about what content types are or their purpose. Added explanation that content types define entry structure, clarified the return type (ContentTypeCollection), and explained use cases for discovering available content structures.

message: Operation 'getContentType' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Both summary and description lack context about what content types are and what information is returned. Improved summary to clarify 'definition' aspect. Enhanced description to explain the return value (ContentType with field definitions and validation rules) and practical use cases for schema inspection.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific content type definition
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single content type definition by its ID from the specified space and environment. Returns the complete ContentType object including all field definitions, validation rules, display information, and system metadata. Use this operation to inspect the structure and schema of a specific content type before working with its entries.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description lack context about what content types are and what information is returned. Improved summary to clarify 'definition' aspect. Enhanced description to explain the return value (ContentType with field definitions and validation rules) and practical use cases for schema inspection.

message: Operation 'getLocales' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary and description provide no context about what locales are or their purpose in content delivery. Added explanation that locales represent language/region combinations, clarified the return type (LocaleCollection), and explained the operation's role in content localization workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all available locales (language and region combinations) configured for the specified space and environment. Returns a LocaleCollection containing locale codes, names, and configuration details. Use this operation to discover which languages and regional variants are available for localizing content delivery.
data.reasoning: Summary and description provide no context about what locales are or their purpose in content delivery. Added explanation that locales represent language/region combinations, clarified the return type (LocaleCollection), and explained the operation's role in content localization workflows.

Operation 'getTags' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Added context about what tags are used for, clarified that this returns a collection, and mentioned pagination/filtering support to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all tags in a space environment
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all tags available in the specified space and environment. Tags are used to organize and categorize content entries. Returns a TagCollection containing tag objects with their metadata. Supports pagination and filtering parameters to manage large tag collections.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Added context about what tags are used for, clarified that this returns a collection, and mentioned pagination/filtering support to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

message: Operation 'getSpace' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack specificity and context. Enhanced to clarify what information is returned (Space object with metadata, configuration, locales) and the operation's purpose in understanding space structure, improving AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves metadata and configuration information for a specific space. Returns a Space object containing the space's system information, name, and localization settings. This operation provides details about the space structure and available locales for content delivery.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity and context. Enhanced to clarify what information is returned (Space object with metadata, configuration, locales) and the operation's purpose in understanding space structure, improving AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getEntries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While the summary is adequate, the description lacks detail about what is returned (EntryCollection schema), the types of filtering available, and practical use cases. Added information about return type and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve a collection of entries filtered by optional query parameters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of entries from the specified space and environment. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination through optional query parameters. Returns an EntryCollection containing matching entries with their complete content and system metadata. Use this operation to fetch multiple entries based on content type, tags, or other criteria.
data.reasoning: While the summary is adequate, the description lacks detail about what is returned (EntryCollection schema), the types of filtering available, and practical use cases. Added information about return type and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Both summary and description are overly generic and lack specificity. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup mechanism. Enhanced description to explain what is returned (Entry object with fields and metadata) and when to use this operation, making it clearer for AI agents to determine appropriate usage.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific entry by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single entry by its ID from the specified space and environment. Returns the complete Entry object including all fields, system metadata, and localized content. Use this operation when you need to fetch a specific piece of content by its entry ID.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are overly generic and lack specificity. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup mechanism. Enhanced description to explain what is returned (Entry object with fields and metadata) and when to use this operation, making it clearer for AI agents to determine appropriate usage.

message: Operation 'getAssets' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary and description are extremely vague with no context about what assets are or what is returned. Added clarification that assets include media files, explained the return type (AssetCollection), and provided context about the operation's purpose in content delivery workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of assets (images, videos, documents, and other media files) from the specified space and environment. Supports filtering and pagination through optional query parameters. Returns an AssetCollection containing asset metadata including URLs, file information, and system details. Use this operation to discover and fetch media files for delivery to applications or websites.
data.reasoning: Summary and description are extremely vague with no context about what assets are or what is returned. Added clarification that assets include media files, explained the return type (AssetCollection), and provided context about the operation's purpose in content delivery workflows.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific asset by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single asset by its ID from the specified space and environment. Returns the complete Asset object including file metadata, URLs, and system information. data.reasoning: Both summary and description lack specificity and context. Improved summary to clarify the 'by ID' lookup. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all content type definitions available in the specified space and environment. Content types define the structure and fields for entries. Returns a ContentTypeCollection containing metadata about each content type including field definitions, validation rules, and system information. data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific content type definition

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all available locales (language and region combinations) configured for the specified space and environment.
